# Completions - Bash Configuration

Update the current system's bash shell configuration to include completions for the  command-line interface.

## Usage

The config command can be executed using the following syntax:


```bash
$ npx cli completions bash config [options]
```


```bash
$ yarn exec cli completions bash config [options]
```


```bash
$ pnpm exec cli completions bash config [options]
```


```bash
$ bun x cli completions bash config [options]
```


## Options

The following options are available for the config command:

This command does not have any options.
